activation_checklist: Enable Supabase PITR (Point-in-Time Recovery) in project settings
Configure S3 bucket with Object Lock (WORM) for backup storage
Set up cross-region replication: EU_WEST + EU_CENTRAL
Run POST /api/dr/simulate to execute first DR simulation (creates dr_simulation_runs entry)
Run POST /api/resilience/chaos to execute full chaos gauntlet (dry-run safe)
Set CHAOS_TESTING_ENABLED=true for non-dry-run chaos (staging only)
Monitor replayable_events table for RPO=0 verification
Expected post-activation grade: B (≥80 resilience score)
